rules.description: WAF rule sets are constantly updated to guard against new attacks. Upgrading to the latest DRS version will provide enhanced engine performance, better protection, and a reduction in false positives. It is recommended to use the latest DRS rule set version.
rules.query: extend ruleset1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0], ruleset2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1], ruleSetType1=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[0].ruleSetType, ruleSetType2=properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets[1].ruleSetType | where (ruleSetType1 =~ "OWASP" and (ruleset1["ruleSetVersion"] in ("2.2.9","3.0","3.1","3.2"))) or (ruleSetType2 =~ "OWASP" and (ruleset2["ruleSetVersion"] in ("2.2.9","3.0","3.1","3.2")))
rules.fix: use the latest DRS rule set version

ARM_Fix.details: In properties.managedRules.managedRuleSets, replace OWASP CRS entries with a Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet entry using ruleSetVersion '2.1'. Remove legacy ruleSetType 'OWASP' entries and add: { 'ruleSetType': 'Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet', 'ruleSetVersion': '2.1' }.

TF_Fix.details: In the managed_rules block, replace OWASP managed_rule_set entries with a Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet entry using version '2.1'. Remove legacy type 'OWASP' rule sets and add: managed_rule_set { type = "Microsoft_DefaultRuleSet" version = "2.1" }.
